bodyText:

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.a: All companies registered under Companies Act must get audited annually. LLPs with turnover >₹40L or capital >₹25L also require audit.
Tax audit is required when business turnover exceeds ₹1 crore (₹10 crore if cash transactions <5%) or professional receipts exceed ₹50 lakhs.

faqs.q: How long does an audit take?
faqs.a: Typically 2-4 weeks depending on company size. We provide a detailed timeline at engagement stage.

faqs.q: Do you provide audit services in Dehradun?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. Capital of Uttarakhand — education and IT hub. Contact +91 99622 60333 for a free consultation.

faqs.q: What is the nearest Virtual Auditor office to Dehradun?
faqs.a: Our nearest office depends on your location. Chennai (HQ): Spencer Plaza, Anna Salai. Bangalore: MG Road. Mumbai: Goregaon West. All services available remotely for Dehradun clients.

faqs.q: How do I get started with audit services in Dehradun?
faqs.a: Call +91 99622 60333 or WhatsApp us. Free 30-minute consultation. We handle the complete process for Dehradun businesses with no location surcharges.
